title: Section 27
content: 1* * * The Directors of the said Association shall, from time to time, fix the rates at which the said Association will Warehouse Goods and receive Goods at its Wharfs, and 2* * * a table of such rates shall be placed at every Warehouse and Wharf of the said Association
footnote: 1. The words “And it is hereby enacted, that” omitted by Act 12 of 1891, s. 2 and Sch.I 2. The word “that” omitted by Act 12 of 1891, s. 2 and Sch. I
